upload.verificationMessage: Please verify your email address to upload videos. Check your inbox for the verification link or resend the email.
upload.title: Upload Video
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your video here
upload.thumbnailPlaceholder: Upload thumbnail or drag and drop
upload.titlePlaceholder: Add a title that describes your video
upload.tagsPlaceholder: Add tags separated by commas (e.g. gaming, tutorial, fun)
upload.tagsHelp: Tags help viewers find your video. Max 10 tags, 30 characters each.

search.tryDifferent: Try different keywords or check your spelling
search.enterSearch: Enter a search term to find videos

verifyEmail.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verifyEmail.loginToResend: Log in to resend the verification email.

verificationBanner.unlockFeatures: to unlock all features including video uploads

errors.loadVideos: Failed to load videos. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action

history.title: Watch History
history.emptyDescription: Videos you watch will appear here
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear your watch history?

watchLater.emptyDescription: Save videos to watch later by clicking the bookmark button
watchLater.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear your Watch Later list?

likedVideos.emptyDescription: Videos you like will appear here

settings.deleteAccountDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

reports.emptyDescription: You have not reported any videos yet.
reports.loginMessage: Please sign in to view your report history.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve 3Play by sharing your thoughts, reporting bugs, or suggesting features.
feedback.emailHelp: We may contact you for additional information.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your feedback in detail...
feedback.successMessage: Your feedback has been submitted successfully. We appreciate your input and will review it shortly.

about.title: About 3Play
about.description: 3Play is a modern video platform for sharing and discovering video content.
about.missionText: To provide content creators with a platform to share their videos with the world.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.
privacy.dataText: We collect only the necessary information to provide our services, including account information and platform activity.
privacy.usageText: We use your data to provide, maintain, and improve our services.
privacy.securityText: We implement modern security measures to protect your personal information.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this policy, contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to 3Play. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.accountsText1: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information.
terms.accountsText2: You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the platform.
terms.contentText1: You retain ownership of any content you upload to 3Play. By uploading content, you grant us a worldwide license.
terms.contentText2: You may not upload content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, or otherwise objectionable.
terms.prohibitedText: You agree not to engage in any of the following prohibited activities:
terms.prohibited2: Attempting to access accounts without authorization
terms.prohibited3: Interfering with the platform's security features
terms.prohibited4: Using the platform for illegal purposes
terms.terminationText: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever.
terms.liabilityText: In no event shall 3Play be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
